results.title: Mumbai Housing Society Queries: Election Rules, Tree Damage Liability & Members' Legal Rights
results.description: Legal expert Sharmila Ranade clarifies two key housing society issues: societies with fewer than 250 members can appoint a trained returning officer to conduct committee elections without direct SCEA supervision, while managing committees may be held liable for vehicle damage caused by neglected tree maintenance, with compensation recoverable from responsible office bearers.

results.title: Mauritius-based FII raises stake in this company by acquiring 4.5 crore convertible warrants, details
results.description: Magnifica Global Opportunities VCC–MGO High Conviction Fund Incorporated VCC Sub-Fund has raised its stake in Zee Media Corporation by acquiring 4.5 crore fully convertible warrants through a preferential allotment. With this acquisition, the company's holding has increased to 5.04 per cent. Prior to the acquisition, the fund held 3,69,645 equity shares, accounting for 0.06 per cent of the company's voting share capital. Following the allotment, the investor's total holding has increased to 4,53,69,645 securities, comprising 3,69,645 equity shares and 4.5 crore convertible warrants.

results.title: India Distances Itself from Alleged Track-2 Talks with Pakistan
results.description: The Indian government has officially distanced itself from the alleged Track-2 dialogues with Pakistan, clarifying that these meetings are private initiatives without any formal connection to the government. Foreign Secretary Vikram Misri emphasized that such gatherings should not be given undue importance, as they do not represent official policy or stance. Recent reports of informal discussions involving former officials and experts have prompted government inquiries, but Misri reiterated that these dialogues lack substantial official relevance. This statement underscores New Delhi's position on maintaining distance from informal diplomatic initiatives.

results.title: M25 Crash Latest News: ‘Loving’ Father of 3 Legton Zulu Dies After Fatal Two Lorry Collision — Check Current Status, Affected Routes, Alternative Routes, Helpline Numbers & More
results.description: A fatal M25 lorry crash claimed the life of HGV driver Legton Zulu, leaving behind his wife and three sons as police continue investigating.
